# services.namecoind

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.namecoind`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.namecoind.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable namecoind, Namecoin client. |
| `services.namecoind.extraNodes` | `list of string` | List of additional peer IP addresses to connect to. |
| `services.namecoind.generate` | `boolean` | Whether to generate (mine) Namecoins. |
| `services.namecoind.rpc.address` | `string` | IP address the RPC server will bind to. |
| `services.namecoind.rpc.allowFrom` | `list of string` | List of IP address ranges allowed to use the RPC API. Wiledcards (\*) can be user to specify a range. |
| `services.namecoind.rpc.certificate` | `null or absolute path` | Certificate file for securing RPC connections. |
| `services.namecoind.rpc.key` | `null or absolute path` | Key file for securing RPC connections. |
| `services.namecoind.rpc.password` | `null or string` | Password for RPC connections. |
| `services.namecoind.rpc.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port the RPC server will bind to. |
| `services.namecoind.rpc.user` | `null or string` | User name for RPC connections. |
| `services.namecoind.trustedNodes` | `list of string` | List of the only peer IP addresses to connect to. If specified no other connection will be made. |
| `services.namecoind.wallet` | `absolute path` | Wallet file. The ownership of the file has to be namecoin:namecoin, and the permissions must be 0640. |
